reviews.text: Michael is an exceptional photographer who truly knows how to put people at ease. From the moment you step in front of his camera, he creates a relaxed, comfortable environment that makes the entire experience feel natural and effortless. His professionalism, eye for detail, and ability to capture authentic moments set him apart. Not only is he incredibly talented, but he is also a genuine pleasure to work with. I highly recommend Michael to anyone looking for a skilled photographer who delivers both beautiful results and a great experience.

Michael did an amazing job shooting our engagement in February. My fiancé and his Aunt had been in touch with Michael prior to my surprise proposal. They said he was wonderful at communicating with them and helped ease their stress of capturing such a special moment. Fast forward to the proposal, Michael did such a great job at capturing every single moment. He was SO easy to work with and very personable. We got a sneak peek at our photos the very next day, and all of our pictures back much sooner than we even expected! We had such a great experience and if we’re ever back in Vail (we’re from WI) we will be sure to book a shoot with Michael. Thanks again Michael!

Michael was incredibly professional and fabulous to work with.  He took photos of our newborn baby and family lifestyle pictures for us.  He was such a great photographer that worked really well with children.  I highly recommend him.

I reached out to Michael from North Carolina about engagement photos and had absolutely no idea where to start. Being out of town, I didn’t know locations, timing, or how to plan any of it. Michael handled everything. He drove all the way to Beaver Creek, scouted locations in person, FaceTimed me while walking the area, and helped plan every detail so the proposal went perfectly. He completely took the stress off my shoulders and made the entire process effortless. The proposal turned out incredible and is something I’ll remember forever. If you’re visiting from out of town and planning a proposal, or even if you’re local, Michael is the person to use. The photos were excellent, and his level of service went far beyond just taking pictures.

What a fantastic guy! And what a memorable experience. Last Spring, my wife surprised me with a "Photo Safari" with Michael while our family visited Vail. Michael picked me up early in the morning from our rental house and we drove to Sylvan Lake for a sunrise photo tour. I'm a hobby landscape photographer, so I already have a basic working knowledge of my camera. But what Michael taught me that morning that meant the most was what to look for in a good landscape shot. He taught me to look beyond the sweeping vistas of the mountains. To capture other magazine-quality images in the early morning dew of Aspen leaves and fallen bird feathers. We had great conversations along the way about our photography experiences and our families. I would absolutely take a photo tour with Michael again if I have the chance!
